testsuite.name: OrderService

testcase.name: findById with non-existent ID should throw OrderNotFoundException
createOrder should persist order and start Camunda process
updateStatus to FULFILLED should publish OrderFulfilledEvent
updateStatus with invalid transition should throw InvalidStatusTransitionException
amount > 1000 should result in VALIDATING -> PENDING_OVERRIDE path
amount <= 1000 should result in VALIDATING -> AUTO_APPROVED path
updateStatus with valid transition should succeed

testsuite.system-out: 13:49:15.453 [Test worker] INFO com.example.orderfulfilment.service.domain.OrderService -- Order ed6f6cfd-d996-4fc7-9f73-d30f670a5392 created with status RECEIVED 13:49:15.458 [Test worker] INFO com.example.orderfulfilment.service.domain.OrderService -- Process instance proc-123 started for order ed6f6cfd-d996-4fc7-9f73-d30f670a5392 13:49:15.483 [Test worker] INFO com.example.orderfulfilment.service.domain.OrderService -- Order b37102df-0079-4f33-8f9d-91730d9e5b9b status: FULFILLED -> FULFILLED 13:49:15.484 [Test worker] INFO com.example.orderfulfilment.service.domain.OrderService -- OrderFulfilledEvent published for order b37102df-0079-4f33-8f9d-91730d9e5b9b 13:49:15.492 [Test worker] INFO com.example.orderfulfilment.service.domain.OrderService -- Order 7aec31fc-47b1-4294-8c13-79630ec84d65 status: PENDING_OVERRIDE -> PENDING_OVERRIDE 13:49:15.494 [Test worker] INFO com.example.orderfulfilment.service.domain.OrderService -- Order 767fd5f7-76d8-469a-b834-15b8bf8f49ef status: AUTO_APPROVED -> AUTO_APPROVED 13:49:15.497 [Test worker] INFO com.example.orderfulfilment.service.domain.OrderService -- Order d569939e-ea52-4051-83aa-ec42c8afb0f6 status: PENDING_OVERRIDE -> PENDING_OVERRIDE
